additional_rules.name: hardcoded-color-class
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded color class — use theme tokens (bg-background, text-foreground, etc.)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace bg-white with bg-background, bg-black with bg-foreground, bg-gray-* with bg-muted or bg-accent, text-white with text-primary-foreground, text-black with text-foreground, text-gray-* with text-muted-foreground.

additional_rules.name: tailwind-font-size-class
additional_rules.message: Tailwind font-size class — use inline style={{ fontSize }} with the project type scale
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace text-sm / text-lg / etc. with style={{ fontSize: '0.875rem' }} or the appropriate project type scale value.

additional_rules.name: import-order-violation
additional_rules.fix_hint: Reorder imports: 1) react/react-*, 2) third-party packages, 3) @/app/components/shared, 4) relative imports (./ ../).
additional_rules._note: Import order is structural (not single-line grep). Engine delegates to layer-2 linter or agent check. This rule serves as documentation for the convention.

additional_rules.name: hook-naming-convention
additional_rules.message: Hook file exports a function not starting with 'use' — React hooks must follow the useXxx naming convention
additional_rules.fix_hint: Rename the function to start with 'use' (e.g., useAuth, useTheme). This is required by React's rules-of-hooks ESLint rule.

additional_rules.name: component-lowercase-filename
additional_rules.message: Component import from a lowercase filename — React component files should use PascalCase (e.g., Button.tsx, UserCard.tsx)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Rename the file to PascalCase matching the exported component name.

additional_rules.name: page-route-co-location
additional_rules.message: Page component defined in components directory — page components should be in src/routes/ or src/pages/ for framework routing
additional_rules.fix_hint: Move page components to the appropriate routing directory (src/routes/ for TanStack Router, src/pages/ for file-based routing).

additional_rules.name: img-missing-alt
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add alt="descriptive text" or alt="" for decorative images

additional_rules.name: click-without-keyboard
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add onKeyDown handler or use a <button> element

additional_rules.name: hardcoded-color-no-contrast-check
additional_rules.message: Hardcoded color — verify WCAG contrast ratio (4.5:1 for text)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use design tokens or verify contrast with a tool

additional_rules.name: input-without-label
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add aria-label, aria-labelledby, or a <label> with matching for/id

additional_boundaries.name: Shared components must not import from feature directories
additional_boundaries.message: Shared component imports from a feature directory — shared components must not depend on feature-specific code
